---
title: "checkUpkeep (BaseAuction)"
---
stateDiagram-v2
    direction TB
    [*] --> q_init: feeAggregator = s_feeAggregator; auctions = s_allowlistedAssets.values()
    q_init --> q_iter: i = 0
    q_iter --> q_skip: assetParams.decimals == 0
    q_skip --> q_next: continue
    q_iter --> q_getprice: assetParams.decimals != 0
    q_getprice --> q_check_assetout: getAssetPrice(asset, false)
    q_check_assetout --> q_check_live: asset == s_assetOut ? isAssetOutPriceValid = isPriceValid
    q_check_live --> q_check_ended: auctionStart != 0
    q_check_ended --> q_add_ended: duration elapsed OR (priceValid AND balance below minAuctionSize)
    q_check_ended --> q_next: auction still live
    q_add_ended --> q_next: endedAuctions[idx++] = asset
    q_check_live --> q_check_eligible: auctionStart == 0 AND isPriceValid
    q_check_eligible --> q_add_eligible: availableAssetUsdValue >= minAuctionSizeUsd
    q_check_eligible --> q_next: below min auction size
    q_add_eligible --> q_next: eligibleAssets[idx++] = AssetAmount(asset, balance)
    q_check_live --> q_next: auctionStart == 0 AND !isPriceValid
    q_next --> q_iter: i++; i < auctions.length
    q_next --> q_assetout_gate: i >= auctions.length
    q_assetout_gate --> q_clear_eligible: !isAssetOutPriceValid
    q_clear_eligible --> q_encode: eligibleAssetsIdx = 0
    q_assetout_gate --> q_encode: isAssetOutPriceValid
    q_encode --> [*]: return (upkeepNeeded, performData)

    note right of q_check_ended
        INV-001: Auction ends when duration elapsed OR remaining balance below minAuctionSizeUsd (dust guard)
    end note

    note right of q_assetout_gate
        INV-002: No auctions started if assetOut price is invalid - bids would revert
    end note

    note right of q_check_eligible
        INV-003: Only feeAggregator balance is counted for eligible assets (not auction contract balance)
    end note

1→---
     2→title: "performUpkeep (BaseAuction)"
     3→---
     4→stateDiagram-v2
     5→    direction TB
     6→    [*] --> q_decode: decode(performData) to eligibleAssets, endedAuctions
     7→    q_decode --> q_getprice: eligibleAssets.length > 0
     8→    q_decode --> q_end_loop: eligibleAssets.length == 0
     9→    q_getprice --> q_transfer_funds: assetOutPrice = getAssetPrice(assetOut, true)
    10→    q_transfer_funds --> q_start_loop: hasFeeAggregator ? feeAggregator.transferForSwap(this, eligibleAssets)
    11→    q_start_loop --> q_check_live: i = 0; i < eligibleAssets.length
    12→    q_check_live --> q_revert_live: s_auctionStarts[asset] != 0
    13→    q_revert_live --> q_error: revert LiveAuction()
    14→    q_check_live --> q_check_params: auctionStart == 0
    15→    q_check_params --> q_revert_params: assetDecimals == 0
    16→    q_revert_params --> q_error: revert AssetParamsNotSet(asset)
    17→    q_check_params --> q_get_asset_price: decimals configured
    18→    q_get_asset_price --> q_check_min_size: assetPrice fetched
    19→    q_check_min_size --> q_revert_size: availableAssetUsdValue < minAuctionSizeUsd
    20→    q_revert_size --> q_error: revert AmountBelowMinAuctionSize
    21→    q_check_min_size --> q_is_assetout: value >= minAuctionSizeUsd
    22→    q_is_assetout --> q_forward_assetout: asset == s_assetOut
    23→    q_forward_assetout --> q_next_start: transfer all balance to assetOutReceiver
    24→    q_is_assetout --> q_start_auction: asset != s_assetOut
    25→    q_start_auction --> q_next_start: s_auctionStarts[asset] = block.timestamp; emit AuctionStarted
    26→    q_next_start --> q_start_loop: i++
    27→    q_start_loop --> q_end_loop: i >= eligibleAssets.length
    28→    q_end_loop --> q_end_iter: j = 0; j < endedAuctions.length
    29→    q_end_iter --> q_check_end_valid: endedAuctions[j]
    30→    q_check_end_valid --> q_revert_invalid: s_auctionStarts[asset] == 0
    31→    q_revert_invalid --> q_error: revert InvalidAuction(asset)
    32→    q_check_end_valid --> q_do_end: auctionStart != 0
    33→    q_do_end --> q_next_end: _onAuctionEnd(asset); delete s_auctionStarts[asset]; emit AuctionEnded
    34→    q_next_end --> q_end_iter: j++
    35→    q_end_iter --> [*]: j >= endedAuctions.length
    36→    q_error --> [*]
    37→
    38→    note right of q_start_auction
    39→        INV-004: Auction start timestamp set to block.timestamp, used for price decay calculation
    40→    end note
    41→
    42→    note right of q_forward_assetout
    43→        INV-005: If eligible asset IS the assetOut, balance forwarded to receiver instead of starting auction
    44→    end note
    45→
    46→    note right of q_do_end
    47→        INV-006: _onAuctionEnd returns remaining asset to feeAggregator and assetOut to receiver
    48→    end note

file.content:
---
title: "performUpkeep (BaseAuction)"
---
stateDiagram-v2
    direction TB
    [*] --> q_decode: decode(performData) to eligibleAssets, endedAuctions
    q_decode --> q_getprice: eligibleAssets.length > 0
    q_decode --> q_end_loop: eligibleAssets.length == 0
    q_getprice --> q_transfer_funds: assetOutPrice = getAssetPrice(assetOut, true)
    q_transfer_funds --> q_start_loop: hasFeeAggregator ? feeAggregator.transferForSwap(this, eligibleAssets)
    q_start_loop --> q_check_live: i = 0; i < eligibleAssets.length
    q_check_live --> q_revert_live: s_auctionStarts[asset] != 0
    q_revert_live --> q_error: revert LiveAuction()
    q_check_live --> q_check_params: auctionStart == 0
    q_check_params --> q_revert_params: assetDecimals == 0
    q_revert_params --> q_error: revert AssetParamsNotSet(asset)
    q_check_params --> q_get_asset_price: decimals configured
    q_get_asset_price --> q_check_min_size: assetPrice fetched
    q_check_min_size --> q_revert_size: availableAssetUsdValue < minAuctionSizeUsd
    q_revert_size --> q_error: revert AmountBelowMinAuctionSize
    q_check_min_size --> q_is_assetout: value >= minAuctionSizeUsd
    q_is_assetout --> q_forward_assetout: asset == s_assetOut
    q_forward_assetout --> q_next_start: transfer all balance to assetOutReceiver
    q_is_assetout --> q_start_auction: asset != s_assetOut
    q_start_auction --> q_next_start: s_auctionStarts[asset] = block.timestamp; emit AuctionStarted
    q_next_start --> q_start_loop: i++
    q_start_loop --> q_end_loop: i >= eligibleAssets.length
    q_end_loop --> q_end_iter: j = 0; j < endedAuctions.length
    q_end_iter --> q_check_end_valid: endedAuctions[j]
    q_check_end_valid --> q_revert_invalid: s_auctionStarts[asset] == 0
    q_revert_invalid --> q_error: revert InvalidAuction(asset)
    q_check_end_valid --> q_do_end: auctionStart != 0
    q_do_end --> q_next_end: _onAuctionEnd(asset); delete s_auctionStarts[asset]; emit AuctionEnded
    q_next_end --> q_end_iter: j++
    q_end_iter --> [*]: j >= endedAuctions.length
    q_error --> [*]

    note right of q_start_auction
        INV-004: Auction start timestamp set to block.timestamp, used for price decay calculation
    end note

    note right of q_forward_assetout
        INV-005: If eligible asset IS the assetOut, balance forwarded to receiver instead of starting auction
    end note

    note right of q_do_end
        INV-006: _onAuctionEnd returns remaining asset to feeAggregator and assetOut to receiver
    end note

content.content:
1→---
     2→title: "bid (BaseAuction)"
     3→---
     4→stateDiagram-v2
     5→    direction TB
     6→    [*] --> q_reentrancy: check s_entered
     7→    q_reentrancy --> q_revert_reentrant: s_entered == true
     8→    q_revert_reentrant --> q_error: revert ReentrantCall()
     9→    q_reentrancy --> q_lock: s_entered == false
    10→    q_lock --> q_load: s_entered = true
    11→    q_load --> q_check_auction: load assetParams, auctionStart; elapsedTime = block.timestamp - auctionStart
    12→    q_check_auction --> q_revert_invalid: auctionStart == 0 OR elapsedTime > auctionDuration
    13→    q_revert_invalid --> q_error: revert InvalidAuction(asset)
    14→    q_check_auction --> q_get_price: auction is live
    15→    q_get_price --> q_check_min_bid: assetPrice = getAssetPrice(asset, true); bidUsdValue = amount * assetPrice / 10^decimals
    16→    q_check_min_bid --> q_revert_low: bidUsdValue < minBidUsdValue
    17→    q_revert_low --> q_error: revert BidValueTooLow
    18→    q_check_min_bid --> q_check_balance: bidUsdValue >= minBidUsdValue
    19→    q_check_balance --> q_revert_high: amount > availableBalance
    20→    q_revert_high --> q_error: revert BidAmountTooHigh
    21→    q_check_balance --> q_compute: amount <= availableBalance
    22→    q_compute --> q_transfer_out: assetOutAmount = _getAssetOutAmount(params, price, amount, elapsed, true)
    23→    q_transfer_out --> q_callback_check: safeTransfer(msg.sender, amount)
    24→    q_callback_check --> q_callback: data.length != 0
    25→    q_callback_check --> q_pull: data.length == 0
    26→    q_callback --> q_pull: auctionCallback(msg.sender, assetOut, assetOutAmount, data)
    27→    q_pull --> q_emit: safeTransferFrom(msg.sender, this, assetOutAmount)
    28→    q_emit --> q_unlock: emit AuctionBidSettled
    29→    q_unlock --> [*]: s_entered = false
    30→    q_error --> [*]
    31→
    32→    note right of q_transfer_out
    33→        INV-007: Asset transferred to bidder BEFORE pulling payment (callback pattern enables flash-loan-style bids)
    34→    end note
    35→
    36→    note right of q_lock

    38→    end note

file.content:
---
title: "bid (BaseAuction)"
---
stateDiagram-v2
    direction TB
    [*] --> q_reentrancy: check s_entered
    q_reentrancy --> q_revert_reentrant: s_entered == true
    q_revert_reentrant --> q_error: revert ReentrantCall()
    q_reentrancy --> q_lock: s_entered == false
    q_lock --> q_load: s_entered = true
    q_load --> q_check_auction: load assetParams, auctionStart; elapsedTime = block.timestamp - auctionStart
    q_check_auction --> q_revert_invalid: auctionStart == 0 OR elapsedTime > auctionDuration
    q_revert_invalid --> q_error: revert InvalidAuction(asset)
    q_check_auction --> q_get_price: auction is live
    q_get_price --> q_check_min_bid: assetPrice = getAssetPrice(asset, true); bidUsdValue = amount * assetPrice / 10^decimals
    q_check_min_bid --> q_revert_low: bidUsdValue < minBidUsdValue
    q_revert_low --> q_error: revert BidValueTooLow
    q_check_min_bid --> q_check_balance: bidUsdValue >= minBidUsdValue
    q_check_balance --> q_revert_high: amount > availableBalance
    q_revert_high --> q_error: revert BidAmountTooHigh
    q_check_balance --> q_compute: amount <= availableBalance
    q_compute --> q_transfer_out: assetOutAmount = _getAssetOutAmount(params, price, amount, elapsed, true)
    q_transfer_out --> q_callback_check: safeTransfer(msg.sender, amount)
    q_callback_check --> q_callback: data.length != 0
    q_callback_check --> q_pull: data.length == 0
    q_callback --> q_pull: auctionCallback(msg.sender, assetOut, assetOutAmount, data)
    q_pull --> q_emit: safeTransferFrom(msg.sender, this, assetOutAmount)
    q_emit --> q_unlock: emit AuctionBidSettled
    q_unlock --> [*]: s_entered = false
    q_error --> [*]

    note right of q_transfer_out
        INV-007: Asset transferred to bidder BEFORE pulling payment (callback pattern enables flash-loan-style bids)
    end note

    note right of q_lock
        INV-008: Manual reentrancy guard via s_entered boolean flag
    end note

    note right of q_compute
        INV-009: Price includes linear decay multiplier based on elapsed auction time
    end note

    10→    q_remove_loop --> q_remove_check: i = 0; i < removes.length
    11→    q_remove_check --> q_check_remove_live: asset = removes[i]
    12→    q_check_remove_live --> q_revert_live: (asset == assetOut AND liveAuctionExists) OR auctionStart != 0
    13→    q_revert_live --> q_error: revert LiveAuction()

    15→    q_check_remove_params --> q_revert_not_set: assetParams.decimals == 0

    21→    q_add_loop --> q_add_check: j = 0; j < adds.length

    27→    q_revert_not_allowed --> q_error: revert AssetNotAllowlisted
    28→    q_check_allowlist --> q_check_decimals: asset is allowlisted

    30→    q_revert_decimals --> q_error: revert InvalidAssetDecimals

    41→    q_revert_end --> q_error: revert InvalidEndingPriceMultiplier
    42→    q_validate_end_mult --> q_validate_start: endingPriceMultiplier >= minPriceMultiplier
    43→    q_validate_start --> q_revert_start: endingPriceMultiplier > startingPriceMultiplier
    44→    q_revert_start --> q_error: revert StartingPriceMultiplierLowerThanEndingPriceMultiplier
    45→    q_validate_start --> q_save: startingPriceMultiplier >= endingPriceMultiplier

---
title: "_applyAssetParamsUpdates (BaseAuction)"
---
stateDiagram-v2
    direction TB
    [*] --> q_check_empty: adds.length == 0 AND removes.length == 0 ?
    q_check_empty --> q_revert_empty: both empty
    q_revert_empty --> q_error: revert EmptyList()
    q_check_empty --> q_remove_loop: at least one non-empty
    q_remove_loop --> q_remove_check: i = 0; i < removes.length
    q_remove_check --> q_check_remove_live: asset = removes[i]
    q_check_remove_live --> q_revert_live: (asset == assetOut AND liveAuctionExists) OR auctionStart != 0
    q_revert_live --> q_error: revert LiveAuction()
    q_check_remove_live --> q_check_remove_params: no live auction conflict
    q_check_remove_params --> q_revert_not_set: assetParams.decimals == 0
    q_revert_not_set --> q_error: revert AssetParamsNotSet
    q_check_remove_params --> q_do_remove: params exist
    q_do_remove --> q_remove_next: delete s_assetParams[asset]; emit AssetParamsRemoved
    q_remove_next --> q_remove_loop: i++
    q_remove_loop --> q_add_loop: i >= removes.length
    q_add_loop --> q_add_check: j = 0; j < adds.length
    q_add_check --> q_check_add_live: asset = adds[j].asset; assetParams = adds[j].params
    q_check_add_live --> q_revert_live2: (asset == assetOut AND liveAuctionExists) OR auctionStart != 0
    q_revert_live2 --> q_error: revert LiveAuction()
    q_check_add_live --> q_check_allowlist: no live auction conflict
    q_check_allowlist --> q_revert_not_allowed: !s_allowlistedAssets.contains(asset)
    q_revert_not_allowed --> q_error: revert AssetNotAllowlisted
    q_check_allowlist --> q_check_decimals: asset is allowlisted
    q_check_decimals --> q_revert_decimals: params.decimals != actual decimals
    q_revert_decimals --> q_error: revert InvalidAssetDecimals
    q_check_decimals --> q_check_min_size: decimals match
    q_check_min_size --> q_revert_zero: minAuctionSizeUsd == 0
    q_revert_zero --> q_error: revert InvalidZeroValue
    q_check_min_size --> q_check_is_assetout: minAuctionSizeUsd > 0
    q_check_is_assetout --> q_save: asset == s_assetOut (skip duration/multiplier checks)
    q_check_is_assetout --> q_validate_duration: asset != s_assetOut
    q_validate_duration --> q_revert_dur: auctionDuration == 0
    q_revert_dur --> q_error: revert InvalidZeroValue
    q_validate_duration --> q_validate_end_mult: duration > 0
    q_validate_end_mult --> q_revert_end: endingPriceMultiplier < i_minPriceMultiplier
    q_revert_end --> q_error: revert InvalidEndingPriceMultiplier
    q_validate_end_mult --> q_validate_start: endingPriceMultiplier >= minPriceMultiplier
    q_validate_start --> q_revert_start: endingPriceMultiplier > startingPriceMultiplier
    q_revert_start --> q_error: revert StartingPriceMultiplierLowerThanEndingPriceMultiplier
    q_validate_start --> q_save: startingPriceMultiplier >= endingPriceMultiplier
    q_save --> q_add_next: s_assetParams[asset] = assetParams; emit AssetParamsUpdated
    q_add_next --> q_add_loop: j++
    q_add_loop --> [*]: j >= adds.length
    q_error --> [*]

    note right of q_check_is_assetout
        INV-010: AssetOut params skip duration and multiplier validation (only minAuctionSizeUsd required)
    end note

    note right of q_validate_end_mult
        INV-011: endingPriceMultiplier must be >= i_minPriceMultiplier (immutable global lower bound)
    end note

    note right of q_check_add_live
        INV-012: Cannot update params for asset with live auction (prevents mid-auction parameter changes)
    end note

content.content:
1→---
     2→title: "transmit (PriceManager)"
     3→---
     4→stateDiagram-v2
     5→    direction TB
     6→    [*] --> q_check_role: onlyRole(PRICE_ADMIN_ROLE)
     7→    q_check_role --> q_check_empty: caller has role
     8→    q_check_role --> q_revert_role: caller lacks role
     9→    q_revert_role --> [*]: revert AccessControlUnauthorized
    10→    q_check_empty --> q_revert_empty: unverifiedReports.length == 0
    11→    q_revert_empty --> [*]: revert EmptyList()
    12→    q_check_empty --> q_pre_validate_loop: unverifiedReports.length > 0
    13→    q_pre_validate_loop --> q_decode_feed_id: i < unverifiedReports.length
    14→    q_decode_feed_id --> q_check_allowlist: dataStreamsFeedId = bytes32(reportData)
    15→    q_check_allowlist --> q_revert_not_allowed: s_dataStreamsFeedIdToAsset[feedId] == address(0)
    16→    q_revert_not_allowed --> [*]: revert FeedNotAllowlisted(feedId)
    17→    q_check_allowlist --> q_pre_validate_loop: feedId is allowlisted, i++
    18→    q_pre_validate_loop --> q_verify_bulk: loop complete
    19→    q_verify_bulk --> q_store_loop: verifiedReports = verifierProxy.verifyBulk(reports)
    20→    q_store_loop --> q_decode_report: i < verifiedReports.length
    21→    q_decode_report --> q_get_asset: report = abi.decode(verifiedReports[i])
    22→    q_get_asset --> q_cast_price: asset = s_dataStreamsFeedIdToAsset[report.feedId]
    23→    q_cast_price --> q_check_stale: usdPrice = int256(report.price).toUint256()
    24→    q_check_stale --> q_revert_stale: observationsTimestamp < block.timestamp - stalenessThreshold
    25→    q_revert_stale --> [*]: revert StaleFeedData()
    26→    q_check_stale --> q_scale: price is fresh
    27→    q_scale --> q_scale_up: feedDecimals < 18
    28→    q_scale_up --> q_check_zero: usdPrice = usdPrice * 10^(18 - feedDecimals)
    29→    q_scale --> q_scale_down: feedDecimals > 18
    30→    q_scale_down --> q_check_zero: usdPrice = usdPrice / 10^(feedDecimals - 18)
    31→    q_scale --> q_check_zero: feedDecimals == 18
    32→    q_check_zero --> q_revert_zero: usdPrice == 0
    33→    q_revert_zero --> [*]: revert ZeroFeedData()
    34→    q_check_zero --> q_store: usdPrice > 0
    35→    q_store --> q_emit: s_dataStreamsPrice[asset] = DataStreamsPriceInfo(usdPrice, timestamp)
    36→    q_emit --> q_store_loop: emit PriceTransmitted(asset, usdPrice), i++
    37→    q_store_loop --> [*]: loop complete
    38→
    39→    note right of q_cast_price
    40→        INV-001: report.price is cast from int192 to uint256 via SafeCast, reverts on negative
    41→        INV-002: usdPrice is scaled to exactly 18 decimals before storage
    42→        INV-003: only PRICE_ADMIN_ROLE can call transmit
    43→    end note
    44→
    45→    note right of q_pre_validate_loop
    46→        INV-004: all feed IDs are validated as allowlisted BEFORE verifyBulk call
    47→        INV-005: pre-validation loop decodes feedId from unverified data before verification
    48→    end note
    49→
    50→    note right of q_check_stale
    51→        INV-006: staleness check uses observationsTimestamp against block.timestamp - stalenessThreshold
    52→    end note
    53→

file.content:
---
title: "transmit (PriceManager)"
---
stateDiagram-v2
    direction TB
    [*] --> q_check_role: onlyRole(PRICE_ADMIN_ROLE)
    q_check_role --> q_check_empty: caller has role
    q_check_role --> q_revert_role: caller lacks role
    q_revert_role --> [*]: revert AccessControlUnauthorized
    q_check_empty --> q_revert_empty: unverifiedReports.length == 0
    q_revert_empty --> [*]: revert EmptyList()
    q_check_empty --> q_pre_validate_loop: unverifiedReports.length > 0
    q_pre_validate_loop --> q_decode_feed_id: i < unverifiedReports.length
    q_decode_feed_id --> q_check_allowlist: dataStreamsFeedId = bytes32(reportData)
    q_check_allowlist --> q_revert_not_allowed: s_dataStreamsFeedIdToAsset[feedId] == address(0)
    q_revert_not_allowed --> [*]: revert FeedNotAllowlisted(feedId)
    q_check_allowlist --> q_pre_validate_loop: feedId is allowlisted, i++
    q_pre_validate_loop --> q_verify_bulk: loop complete
    q_verify_bulk --> q_store_loop: verifiedReports = verifierProxy.verifyBulk(reports)
    q_store_loop --> q_decode_report: i < verifiedReports.length
    q_decode_report --> q_get_asset: report = abi.decode(verifiedReports[i])
    q_get_asset --> q_cast_price: asset = s_dataStreamsFeedIdToAsset[report.feedId]
    q_cast_price --> q_check_stale: usdPrice = int256(report.price).toUint256()
    q_check_stale --> q_revert_stale: observationsTimestamp < block.timestamp - stalenessThreshold
    q_revert_stale --> [*]: revert StaleFeedData()
    q_check_stale --> q_scale: price is fresh
    q_scale --> q_scale_up: feedDecimals < 18
    q_scale_up --> q_check_zero: usdPrice = usdPrice * 10^(18 - feedDecimals)
    q_scale --> q_scale_down: feedDecimals > 18
    q_scale_down --> q_check_zero: usdPrice = usdPrice / 10^(feedDecimals - 18)
    q_scale --> q_check_zero: feedDecimals == 18
    q_check_zero --> q_revert_zero: usdPrice == 0
    q_revert_zero --> [*]: revert ZeroFeedData()
    q_check_zero --> q_store: usdPrice > 0
    q_store --> q_emit: s_dataStreamsPrice[asset] = DataStreamsPriceInfo(usdPrice, timestamp)
    q_emit --> q_store_loop: emit PriceTransmitted(asset, usdPrice), i++
    q_store_loop --> [*]: loop complete

    note right of q_cast_price
        INV-001: report.price is cast from int192 to uint256 via SafeCast, reverts on negative
        INV-002: usdPrice is scaled to exactly 18 decimals before storage
        INV-003: only PRICE_ADMIN_ROLE can call transmit
    end note

    note right of q_pre_validate_loop
        INV-004: all feed IDs are validated as allowlisted BEFORE verifyBulk call
        INV-005: pre-validation loop decodes feedId from unverified data before verification
    end note

    note right of q_check_stale
        INV-006: staleness check uses observationsTimestamp against block.timestamp - stalenessThreshold
    end note

---
title: "_applyFeedInfoUpdates (PriceManager)"
---
stateDiagram-v2
    direction TB
    [*] --> q_check_empty: adds.length == 0 AND removes.length == 0
    q_check_empty --> q_revert_empty: true
    q_revert_empty --> [*]: revert EmptyList()
    q_check_empty --> q_remove_loop: false

    q_remove_loop --> q_remove_hook: i < removes.length
    q_remove_hook --> q_remove_asset: _onFeedInfoUpdate(asset, true)
    q_remove_asset --> q_revert_not_allowed: !s_allowlistedAssets.remove(asset)
    q_revert_not_allowed --> [*]: revert AssetNotAllowlisted(asset)
    q_remove_asset --> q_cleanup: asset was allowlisted
    q_cleanup --> q_remove_emit: delete feedIdToAsset, feedInfo, dataStreamsPrice
    q_remove_emit --> q_remove_loop: emit AssetRemovedFromAllowlist(asset), i++
    q_remove_loop --> q_add_loop: removes loop complete

    q_add_loop --> q_add_hook: i < adds.length
    q_add_hook --> q_validate_asset: _onFeedInfoUpdate(asset, false)
    q_validate_asset --> q_revert_zero_addr: asset == address(0)
    q_revert_zero_addr --> [*]: revert InvalidZeroAddress()
    q_validate_asset --> q_validate_feed: asset != address(0)
    q_validate_feed --> q_revert_zero_val: stalenessThreshold == 0 OR (feedId == 0 AND dataFeed == 0)
    q_revert_zero_val --> [*]: revert InvalidZeroValue()
    q_validate_feed --> q_check_streams: valid feed params
    q_check_streams --> q_validate_streams: dataStreamsFeedId != bytes32(0)
    q_check_streams --> q_update_allowlist: dataStreamsFeedId == bytes32(0)

    q_validate_streams --> q_revert_decimals: dataStreamsFeedDecimals == 0
    q_revert_decimals --> [*]: revert InvalidFeedDecimals(feedId)
    q_validate_streams --> q_check_version: decimals > 0
    q_check_version --> q_revert_version: version != 3
    q_revert_version --> [*]: revert InvalidFeedVersion(feedId, version)
    q_check_version --> q_check_rotation: version == 3
    q_check_rotation --> q_handle_rotation: previousAsset != address(0) AND previousAsset != asset
    q_handle_rotation --> q_revert_no_fallback: previousAsset.usdDataFeed == address(0)
    q_revert_no_fallback --> [*]: revert InvalidZeroValue()
    q_handle_rotation --> q_clear_prev: previousAsset has usdDataFeed fallback
    q_clear_prev --> q_update_mapping: clear previousAsset streams state
    q_check_rotation --> q_update_mapping: no rotation needed
    q_update_mapping --> q_update_allowlist: s_dataStreamsFeedIdToAsset[feedId] = asset

    q_update_allowlist --> q_emit_added: s_allowlistedAssets.add(asset) returns true (new)
    q_update_allowlist --> q_check_feed_change: asset already allowlisted
    q_check_feed_change --> q_clean_old_feed: existingFeedId != newFeedId
    q_clean_old_feed --> q_store_feed: delete old feedIdToAsset and streamsPrice
    q_check_feed_change --> q_store_feed: feedId unchanged
    q_emit_added --> q_store_feed: emit AssetAddedToAllowlist(asset)

    q_store_feed --> q_emit_updated: s_feedInfo[asset] = feedInfo
    q_emit_updated --> q_add_loop: emit FeedInfoUpdated(asset, feedInfo), i++
    q_add_loop --> [*]: adds loop complete

    note right of q_check_rotation
        INV-001: feed ID rotation must preserve fallback price source for previous asset
        INV-002: s_dataStreamsFeedIdToAsset maps each feedId to exactly one asset
    end note

    note right of q_validate_feed
        INV-003: at least one price source required (dataStreamsFeedId OR usdDataFeed)
        INV-004: stalenessThreshold must be non-zero
        INV-005: data streams feed version must be 3
    end note

    note right of q_update_allowlist
        INV-006: when feedId changes for existing asset, old mappings are cleaned up
        INV-007: s_allowlistedAssets and s_feedInfo are kept in sync
    end note

1→---
     2→title: "_getAssetPrice (PriceManager)"
     3→---
     4→stateDiagram-v2
     5→    direction TB
     6→    [*] --> q_load: priceInfo = s_dataStreamsPrice[asset], feedInfo = s_feedInfo[asset]
     7→    q_load --> q_init: price = priceInfo.usdPrice, updatedAt = priceInfo.timestamp
     8→    q_init --> q_check_stale: minTimestamp = block.timestamp - stalenessThreshold
     9→    q_check_stale --> q_check_fallback: updatedAt < minTimestamp (streams price stale)
    10→    q_check_stale --> q_compute_valid: updatedAt >= minTimestamp (streams price fresh)
    11→
    12→    q_check_fallback --> q_fetch_feed: usdDataFeed != address(0)
    13→    q_check_fallback --> q_compute_valid: usdDataFeed == address(0), no fallback
    14→
    15→    q_fetch_feed --> q_compare_timestamps: (answer, dataFeedUpdatedAt) = usdDataFeed.latestRoundData()
    16→    q_compare_timestamps --> q_use_feed: updatedAt < dataFeedUpdatedAt (feed is newer)
    17→    q_compare_timestamps --> q_compute_valid: updatedAt >= dataFeedUpdatedAt (streams still newer)
    18→
    19→    q_use_feed --> q_scale_feed: price = answer.toUint256(), updatedAt = dataFeedUpdatedAt
    20→    q_scale_feed --> q_scale_up: decimals < 18
    21→    q_scale_up --> q_compute_valid: price = price * 10^(18 - decimals)
    22→    q_scale_feed --> q_scale_down: decimals > 18
    23→    q_scale_down --> q_compute_valid: price = price / 10^(decimals - 18)
    24→    q_scale_feed --> q_compute_valid: decimals == 18
    25→
    26→    q_compute_valid --> q_check_validation: isValid = (price != 0) AND (updatedAt >= minTimestamp)
    27→    q_check_validation --> q_validate: withValidation == true
    28→    q_check_validation --> q_return: withValidation == false
    29→    q_validate --> q_revert_zero: price == 0
    30→    q_revert_zero --> [*]: revert ZeroFeedData()
    31→    q_validate --> q_check_stale_val: price > 0
    32→    q_check_stale_val --> q_revert_stale: updatedAt < minTimestamp
    33→    q_revert_stale --> [*]: revert StaleFeedData()
    34→    q_check_stale_val --> q_return: price is valid and fresh
    35→    q_return --> [*]: return (price, updatedAt, isValid)
    36→
    37→    note right of q_check_stale
    38→        INV-001: Data Streams price is prioritized over Data Feed price
    39→        INV-002: fallback to Data Feed only when streams price is stale AND data feed is configured
    40→    end note
    41→
    42→    note right of q_compare_timestamps
    43→        INV-003: when both sources are stale, the most recent timestamp wins
    44→        INV-004: data feed answer cast from int256 via SafeCast, reverts on negative
    45→    end note
    46→
    47→    note right of q_compute_valid
    48→        INV-005: returned price is always scaled to 18 decimals
    49→        INV-006: isValid is false if price is zero OR stale
    50→    end note
    51→

file.content:
---
title: "_getAssetPrice (PriceManager)"
---
stateDiagram-v2
    direction TB
    [*] --> q_load: priceInfo = s_dataStreamsPrice[asset], feedInfo = s_feedInfo[asset]
    q_load --> q_init: price = priceInfo.usdPrice, updatedAt = priceInfo.timestamp
    q_init --> q_check_stale: minTimestamp = block.timestamp - stalenessThreshold
    q_check_stale --> q_check_fallback: updatedAt < minTimestamp (streams price stale)
    q_check_stale --> q_compute_valid: updatedAt >= minTimestamp (streams price fresh)

    q_check_fallback --> q_fetch_feed: usdDataFeed != address(0)
    q_check_fallback --> q_compute_valid: usdDataFeed == address(0), no fallback

    q_fetch_feed --> q_compare_timestamps: (answer, dataFeedUpdatedAt) = usdDataFeed.latestRoundData()
    q_compare_timestamps --> q_use_feed: updatedAt < dataFeedUpdatedAt (feed is newer)
    q_compare_timestamps --> q_compute_valid: updatedAt >= dataFeedUpdatedAt (streams still newer)

    q_use_feed --> q_scale_feed: price = answer.toUint256(), updatedAt = dataFeedUpdatedAt
    q_scale_feed --> q_scale_up: decimals < 18
    q_scale_up --> q_compute_valid: price = price * 10^(18 - decimals)
    q_scale_feed --> q_scale_down: decimals > 18
    q_scale_down --> q_compute_valid: price = price / 10^(decimals - 18)
    q_scale_feed --> q_compute_valid: decimals == 18

    q_compute_valid --> q_check_validation: isValid = (price != 0) AND (updatedAt >= minTimestamp)
    q_check_validation --> q_validate: withValidation == true
    q_check_validation --> q_return: withValidation == false
    q_validate --> q_revert_zero: price == 0
    q_revert_zero --> [*]: revert ZeroFeedData()
    q_validate --> q_check_stale_val: price > 0
    q_check_stale_val --> q_revert_stale: updatedAt < minTimestamp
    q_revert_stale --> [*]: revert StaleFeedData()
    q_check_stale_val --> q_return: price is valid and fresh
    q_return --> [*]: return (price, updatedAt, isValid)

    note right of q_check_stale
        INV-001: Data Streams price is prioritized over Data Feed price
        INV-002: fallback to Data Feed only when streams price is stale AND data feed is configured
    end note

    note right of q_compare_timestamps
        INV-003: when both sources are stale, the most recent timestamp wins
        INV-004: data feed answer cast from int256 via SafeCast, reverts on negative
    end note

    note right of q_compute_valid
        INV-005: returned price is always scaled to 18 decimals
        INV-006: isValid is false if price is zero OR stale
    end note

content.thinking:
Now I have all the subgraph data. Let me perform the trust model analysis and property generation.

Let me analyze:

**BaseAuction** (7 subgraphs):
- SG-001: checkUpkeep - reads state to determine which auctions to start/end
- SG-002: performUpkeep - starts new auctions, ends completed ones
- SG-003: bid - permissionless bidding with callback pattern
- SG-004: applyAssetParamsUpdates - admin param management
- SG-005: setAssetOut - admin changes output asset


- SG-006: setFeeAggregator - admin changes fee aggregator
- SG-007: getAssetOutAmount - price decay calculation

**PriceManager** (4 subgraphs):
- SG-001: constructor
- SG-002: transmit - price feed submission (PRICE_ADMIN_ROLE)
- SG-003: applyFeedInfoUpdates - feed configuration management
- SG-004: getAssetPrice - price retrieval with fallback

Now I'm starting the trust model analysis to identify the key actors and their roles in the system.

The main participants are bidders and CowSwap solvers who operate without permissions, the automation forwarder that triggers upkeep through the workflow router, trusted admin roles managing parameters, price admins submitting data feeds, and the Chainlink oracle as a fallback. I'm mapping out the trust boundaries between these actors, starting with how untrusted bidders interact with the base auction contract.

Now I'm looking at the callback execution after asset transfers and how solvers interact with the GPV2-compatible auction, both of which are attacker-controlled and in-scope. The automation layer is trusted so it's out of scope, but price submission and external price feeds need scrutiny for staleness and manipulation risks.

For the STRIDE analysis, I'm starting with spoofing—since bidding is permissionless, there's no identity spoofing concern, though admin functions are role-gated. On the tampering side, I need to focus on how stale or manipulated prices can skew auction outcomes and how bidders might abuse callbacks to alter state.

Looking at the remaining threat categories, price feed rotation could introduce stale prices into the system. Denial of service vectors include bids exceeding available balance, price staleness blocking auctions when checkUpkeep invalidates them, and malicious callbacks draining gas. Reentrancy through callbacks is a concern, though the s_entered guard should mitigate it, and there's a potential flash-loan style attack pattern to consider.

For the key properties I want to verify, the reentrancy guard needs to reliably prevent reentrant calls to bid, the price decay calculation must be mathematically correct, and rounding behavior needs to be consistent and secure.

Now I'm identifying the critical invariants across the auction lifecycle: bids can't be placed on expired or non-existent auctions, stale prices must be rejected before execution, assets transfer to the bidder before payment is pulled to enable the callback pattern, bid amounts are validated against available balance, auctions won't start if the assetOut price is invalid, old feed mappings are cleaned up during rotation, and all prices are normalized to 18 decimals for consistency.

Generating the formal properties now...

content.text:
Now I have all the subgraph data. Let me perform the trust model analysis and generate properties.

**Phase A — Trust Model Analysis**

**Actors:**
- Bidders (UNTRUSTED, permissionless)
- CowSwap Solvers (UNTRUSTED, permissionless)
- Automation Forwarder (TRUSTED, out-of-scope)
- Admin Roles (TRUSTED, out-of-scope)
- Price Admin (SEMI_TRUSTED, in-scope for PriceManager logic)
- External Verifier Proxy (OUT_OF_SCOPE)
- Data Feed Oracle (SEMI_TRUSTED, fallback)

**Trust Boundaries:**
1. Bidder → bid(): Network, in-scope, attacker_controlled=true
2. Callback → Bidder contract: IPC/API, in-scope, attacker_controlled=true
3. Solver → GPV2CompatibleAuction: Network, in-scope, attacker_controlled=true
4. Automation → performUpkeep: Internal, out-of-scope
5. Price Admin → transmit: HTTP/gRPC, conditional (role-gated)
6. Data Feed → getAssetPrice: Internal, in-scope for staleness

**Phase B — Property Generation**

Writing output file now.

lines: +      "text": "Data Streams price is prioritized over Data Feed price in getAssetPrice.",
+      "assertion": "getAssetPrice: if streamsPrice.timestamp >= minTimestamp then use streamsPrice, skip dataFeed",
+      "text": "Stale Data Streams price must fall back to Data Feed only when dataFeed is configured.",
+      "assertion": "streamsStale AND usdDataFeed!=address(0) => use dataFeed; usdDataFeed==0 => keep stale streams",
+      "text": "When both price sources are stale, the most recent timestamp wins in getAssetPrice.",
+      "assertion": "if both stale: updatedAt(streams) >= updatedAt(dataFeed) => use streams, else use dataFeed",
+      "text": "All prices returned by getAssetPrice must be scaled to exactly 18 decimals.",
+      "assertion": "forall getAssetPrice: returned price normalized to 18 decimals regardless of source",
+      "text": "getAssetPrice with withValidation=true must revert on zero price.",
+      "text": "getAssetPrice with withValidation=true must revert on stale timestamp.",
+      "text": "Data Feed answer cast via SafeCast must revert on negative price values.",
+      "text": "isValid flag must be false when price is zero OR timestamp is stale.",
+      "text": "transmit must validate all feed IDs as allowlisted BEFORE calling verifyBulk.",
+      "assertion": "forall transmit: pre-validation loop checks s_dataStreamsFeedIdToAsset[feedId]!=0 before verify",
+      "text": "transmit report.price cast from int192 to uint256 must revert on negative values.",
+      "text": "transmit must reject stale report data (observationsTimestamp vs staleness threshold).",
+      "text": "transmit must reject zero price after scaling (prevents storing invalid price data).",
+      "text": "transmit price scaling must normalize all prices to exactly 18 decimals before storage.",
+      "text": "Only PRICE_ADMIN_ROLE can call transmit (access control on price submission).",
+      "text": "Feed ID rotation must preserve fallback price source for previous asset.",
+      "assertion": "feedId rotation: previousAsset must have usdDataFeed fallback or revert InvalidZeroValue",
+      "text": "s_dataStreamsFeedIdToAsset must map each feedId to exactly one asset (no collision).",
+      "assertion": "forall feedId: s_dataStreamsFeedIdToAsset[feedId] maps to at most one asset address",
+      "text": "At least one price source required per asset (dataStreamsFeedId OR usdDataFeed).",
+      "assertion": "forall applyFeedInfoUpdates add: feedId==0 AND dataFeed==0 => revert InvalidZeroValue",
+      "text": "stalenessThreshold must be non-zero for every feed configuration.",
+      "text": "Data Streams feed version must be exactly 3 (protocol requirement).",
+      "assertion": "forall applyFeedInfoUpdates add: dataStreamsFeedId!=0 => version must be 3",
+      "text": "When feedId changes for existing asset, old feedIdToAsset and streamsPrice must be cleaned.",
+      "text": "s_allowlistedAssets and s_feedInfo must remain in sync after add/remove operations.",
+      "assertion": "forall asset: asset in s_allowlistedAssets <=> s_feedInfo[asset] is set",
+      "text": "Data streams feed decimals must be non-zero when data streams feed is configured.",
+      "text": "verifierProxy is immutable after construction (cannot be changed post-deploy).",
+      "assertion": "i_streamsVerifierProxy set in constructor, no setter function exists",
+      "text": "transmit pre-validation decodes feedId from UNVERIFIED data — must not trust content beyond feedId.",
+      "assertion": "pre-validation only reads bytes32(reportData) for feedId check, no other fields trusted",
+      "text": "Stored DataStreamsPriceInfo timestamp must equal report observationsTimestamp, not block.timestamp.",
+      "text": "Price scaling in getAssetPrice must match scaling direction used in transmit.",
+      "assertion": "getAssetPrice dataFeed scaling uses same formula as transmit: dec<18 => multiply, >18 => divide",
+      "text": "transmit with empty unverifiedReports array must revert.",
+      "text": "Price scaling precision loss in division (feedDecimals>18) must not produce zero for valid prices.",
+      "text": "Cryptographic verification of Data Streams reports delegated to verifierProxy (trusted).",
+      "text": "Feed removal must clean all associated state: feedIdToAsset, feedInfo, and dataStreamsPrice.",
+      "assertion": "forall remove: delete s_dataStreamsFeedIdToAsset AND s_feedInfo AND s_dataStreamsPrice for asset",
